scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=ui/admin && npm run type-check --workspace=ui/guard
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=ui/guard && npm run build --workspace=ui/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=ui/admin && npm run lint --workspace=ui/guard
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=ui/admin && npm run format --workspace=ui/guard
